name: Submit affiliate program applications
description: Sam queue job — pull the affiliate application packets from the Manus library and submit them via web forms (1Password, NordVPN, DaVinci Resolve, plus any new program Jed names).
trigger_examples: apply to the davinci affiliate program
prompt_template: Sam: locate the affiliate packet for {{program}} in the Manus library (look under /root/solomon-v4/manus/ or C:\\Users\\Ashle\\Desktop\\Shultz Scripts\\manus). Fill in the application using Jed's standard details from the master context (channel size, audience description, BS branding). Submit via the program's web form using Playwright. Save the submission receipt + application URL to mem('affiliate', {{program}}). Telegram Jed a confirmation.
escalation_conditions: packet missing — escalate to Jed to author it
program asks for a tax form, signature, or banking info — escalate immediately
notes: Public-brand category — Nathan will likely want to review the application copy before submission.
